name: fileops
description: File operations — move, copy, delete, rename. Call fileops:setRoot first with the absolute path to your workspace, otherwise tools will fail-fast on the first non-existent path.

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move a file or directory to a new path. Requires fileops:setRoot to be called first with the workspace root path.

tools.name: copy
tools.description: Copy a file to a new path. Requires fileops:setRoot to be called first with the workspace root path.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a file or empty directory. Requires fileops:setRoot to be called first with the workspace root path.

tools.name: rename
tools.description: Rename a file within its parent directory. Requires fileops:setRoot to be called first with the workspace root path.
